go.get_id.ts:
// For the instance with path /my_sub_collection/my_instance, the following calls
// are equivalent:
const id = go.get_id(); // no path, defaults to the instance containing the calling script
print(id); // => hash: [/my_sub_collection/my_instance]

const id2 = go.get_id("/my_sub_collection/my_instance"); // absolute path
print(id2); // => hash: [/my_sub_collection/my_instance]

const id3 = go.get_id("my_instance"); // relative path
print(id3); // => hash: [/my_sub_collection/my_instance]

msg.url.ts:
const my_socket = "main"; // specify by valid name
const my_path = hash("/my_collection/my_gameobject"); // specify as string or hash
const my_fragment = "component"; // specify as string or hash
const my_url = msg.url(my_socket, my_path, my_fragment);

print(my_url); // => url: [main:/my_collection/my_gameobject#component]
print(my_url.socket); // => 786443 (internal numeric value)
print(my_url.path); // => hash: [/my_collection/my_gameobject]
print(my_url.fragment); // => hash: [component]

vmath.vector3.ts:
const vec = vmath.vector3(1.0, 2.0, 3.0);
print(vec); // => vmath.vector3(1, 2, 3)
print(vec.unm()); // => vmath.vector3(-1, -2, -3)
print(vec.mul(2)); // => vmath.vector3(2, 4, 6)
print(vec.add(vmath.vector3(2.0))); // => vmath.vector3(3, 4, 5)
print(vec.sub(vmath.vector3(2.0))); // => vmath.vector3(-1, 0, 1)

vmath.vector4.ts:
const vec = vmath.vector4(1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0);
print(vec); // => vmath.vector4(1, 2, 3, 4)
print(vec.unm()); // => vmath.vector4(-1, -2, -3, -4)
print(vec.mul(2)); // => vmath.vector4(2, 4, 6, 8)
print(vec.add(vmath.vector4(2.0))); // => vmath.vector4(3, 4, 5, 6)
print(vec.sub(vmath.vector4(2.0))); // => vmath.vector4(-1, 0, 1, 2)

collectionfactory.load.ts:
// How to load resources of a collection factory prototype.
collectionfactory.load("#factory", (self, url, result) => {});

collectionfactory.unload.ts:
// How to unload resources of a collection factory prototype loaded with collectionfactory.load:
collectionfactory.unload("#factory");

factory.load.ts:
// How to load resources of a factory prototype.
factory.load("#factory", (self, url, result) => {});

factory.unload.ts:
// How to unload resources of a factory prototype loaded with factory.load:
factory.unload("#factory");

model.get_aabb.ts:
model.get_aabb("#model"); // => { min = vmath.vector3(-2.5, -3.0, 0), max = vmath.vector3(1.5, 5.5, 0) }
model.get_aabb("#empty"); // => { min = vmath.vector3(0, 0, 0), max = vmath.vector3(0, 0, 0) }

model.get_mesh_aabb.ts: model.get_mesh_aabb("#model"); // => { hash("Sword") = { min = vmath.vector3(-0.5, -0.5, 0), max = vmath.vector3(0.5, 0.5, 0) }, hash("Shield") = { min = vmath.vector3(-0.5, -0.5, -0.5), max = vmath.vector3(0.5, 0.5, 0.5) } }

sound.set_group_gain.ts:
// Set mixer group gain on the "soundfx" group to 50% (-30dB):
sound.set_group_gain("soundfx", 0.5);

tilemap.get_bounds.ts:
// get the level bounds.
const [x, y, w, h] = tilemap.get_bounds("/level#tilemap");

tilemap.get_tile.ts:
// get the tile under the player.
const tileno = tilemap.get_tile("/level#tilemap", "foreground", self.player_x, self.player_y);

tilemap.set_visible.ts:
// Disable rendering of the layer
tilemap.set_visible("/level#tilemap", "foreground", false);

liveupdate.add_mount.ts:
// Add multiple mounts. Higher priority takes precedence.
liveupdate.add_mount("common", "zip:/path/to/common_stuff.zip", 10, (result) => {}); // base pack
liveupdate.add_mount("levelpack_1", "zip:/path/to/levels_1_to_20.zip", 20, (result) => {}); // level pack
liveupdate.add_mount("season_pack_1", "zip:/path/to/easter_pack_1.zip", 30, (result) => {}); // season pack, overriding content in the other packs

liveupdate.remove_mount.ts:
// Add multiple mounts. Higher priority takes precedence.
liveupdate.remove_mount("season_pack_1");

profiler.set_ui_vsync_wait_visible.ts:
// Exclude frame wait time from the profiler ui
profiler.set_ui_vsync_wait_visible(false);

profiler.view_recorded_frame.ts:
// Go back one frame
profiler.view_recorded_frame({ distance: -1 });

sys.get_config_number.ts:
// Get user config value
const speed = sys.get_config_number("my_game.speed", 20.0);

sys.get_config_boolean.ts:
// Get user config value
const vsync = sys.get_config_boolean("display.vsync", false);

sys.set_vsync_swap_interval.ts:
// Setting the swap intervall to swap every v-blank
sys.set_vsync_swap_interval(1);

sys.set_update_frequency.ts:
// Setting the update frequency to 60 frames per second
sys.set_update_frequency(60);
